form.formComment: Won two starts back at Q Lakeside over 352m in 19.80. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 520m at Q Parklands at Mix 5 level. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 300m at this track in a handy (16.70), beating Redeemer's Way. Will find this a bit tougher, predicted to struggle on this occasion.
